в”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ңв”¬в”җв”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ңв”Җв”җв”¬в”Ңв”Җ  в”¬ в”Ңв”җв”Ңв”Ңв”Җв”җв”Ңв”¬в”җв”Ңв”Җв”җв”¬  в”¬  в”Ңв”Җв”җв”¬в”Җв”җ
в””в”Җв”җв”ңв”Җв”Өв”ңв”Җв”Өв””в”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Өв”Ӯ  в”ңв”ҙв”җ  в”Ӯ в”Ӯв”Ӯв”Ӯв””в”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Өв”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Ө в”ңв”¬в”ҳ
в””в”Җв”ҳв”ҙ в”ҙв”ҙ в”ҙв””в”Җв”ҳ в”ҙ в”ҙ в”ҙв””в”Җв”ҳв”ҙ в”ҙ  в”ҙ в”ҳв””в”ҳв””в”Җв”ҳ в”ҙ в”ҙ в”ҙв”ҙв”Җв”ҳв”ҙв”Җв”ҳв””в”Җв”ҳв”ҙв””в”Җ
Description:
  Copy assets from SaaStack 'Standard' or 'Premium' into your SaaStack codebase

Usage:
  SaaStack-Installer [command] [options]

Options:
  --usage-correlation <usage-correlation>  Correlation ID to be used in chaining calls together
  --debug                                  Show more error details when there is an exception
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information
  --version                                Show version information

Commands:
  standard  Copy SaaStack Standard assets
  premium   Copy SaaStack Premium assets

More help online: https://github.com/SaaStacked/saastack-standard
CLI session ended

в””в”Җв”җв”ңв”Җв”Өв”ңв”Җв”Өв””в”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Өв”Ӯ  в”ңв”ҙв”җ  в”Ӯ в”Ӯв”Ӯв”Ӯв””в”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Өв”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Ө в”ңв”¬в”ҳ
в””в”Җв”ҳв”ҙ в”ҙв”ҙ в”ҙв””в”Җв”ҳ в”ҙ в”ҙ в”ҙв””в”Җв”ҳв”ҙ в”ҙ  в”ҙ в”ҳв””в”ҳв””в”Җв”ҳ в”ҙ в”ҙ в”ҙв”ҙв”Җв”ҳв”ҙв”Җв”ҳв””в”Җв”ҳв”ҙв””в”Җ
Description:
  Copy SaaStack Premium assets

Usage:
  SaaStack-Installer premium [options]

Options:
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)  Your GitHub Token (PAT)
  --sln, --solution <sln>     The path and name of a solution (.sln) file. If not specified, the current directory is searched for the first solution file
  --version <version>         A specific version of the SaaStack Premium assets to update
  --category <category>       A specific category of module to update
  --force                     Whether to overwrite files in your codebase if they already exist
  -?, -h, --help              Show help and usage information

More help online: https://github.com/SaaStacked/saastack-standard
CLI session ended
